text:
よし、それじゃ始めましょうか！
今回も前衛で頑張ってみるから。

言い訳しないで、まず矢面に立つ！
って覚悟でね。

いつまでも、きみに頼りっぱなしじゃ
先輩としてカッコつかないし。

Let's get started then, shall we?
I'll take the front line again.

No excuses this time, just me, out there,
taking it all straight on. I'm ready for this.

Can't go falling back on you forever, right?
I'm supposed to be the one with more
experience out here, after all!
